summary: CRITICAL: Test file Clean-Artifacts.Tests.ps1 is missing—workflow references it but it doesn't exist; TDD methodology not demonstrated. Significant issues: (1) Workflow duplicate testing logic in steps 3-5 (manual inline tests) should be Pester tests, violating DRY; (2) PowerShell missing Set-StrictMode, try-catch error handling, -ErrorAction Stop; (3) Max-total-size policy has logic bug—sorts CreatedAt ascending (oldest first) to delete but comment says 'newest first', and logic subtracts from toKeep then moves to delete (backwards); (4) No actionlint validation shown. Workflow will fail immediately when running Invoke-Pester on non-existent test file. Not meeting core TDD+testability requirements.
